# Cue by OptimaAI

Cue by OptimaAI is an asynchronous web development subscription service. It delivers high-quality React, Next.js, and Supabase development without meetings or estimates, operating strictly via an async pipeline with an average delivery time of 48 hours per request.

## What Cue does
Cue provides productized web development. Clients subscribe for a flat monthly fee (starting at $199/mo) and can queue an unlimited number of development tasks. OptimaAI works through the queue one active request at a time, delivering code, UI components, API integrations, and bug fixes directly to the client's repository or staging environment. 

## Who it's for
Cue is designed for English-speaking B2B founders, SaaS companies, and e-commerce brands in the US and Western Europe who need reliable, senior-level web development but want to avoid the overhead of hiring an agency, managing a freelancer, or paying an in-house developer salary.

## How it works
1. Subscribe: The client signs up for one of the three flat-fee subscriptions (Mini, Growth, or Pro).
2. Queue requests: The client gets a dedicated Trello board where they can add as many development requests as they want.
3. Development begins: We pick up the top request from the active queue and begin development.
4. Delivery in 48h: The requested feature is delivered (typically within 48 hours for standard requests).
5. Review & Revisions: The client reviews the work via a Loom video walkthrough or staging link. If revisions are needed, we do them until the client is 100% satisfied.
6. Next task: Once approved, we immediately begin working on the next request in the queue.

## Pricing
- Cue Mini: $199 per month. Best for keeping your existing app or website secure and maintained.
- Cue Growth: $599 per month. Best for active businesses needing marketing pages and workflow automations.
- Cue Pro: $1,495 per month. Best for building full-scale SaaS platforms or custom internal systems from scratch.
- No hidden fees, no hourly billing, no estimates.
- Subscriptions can be paused or cancelled at any time without penalty. If a client pauses with 10 days left in their billing cycle, they retain those 10 days to use in the future.

## What can be requested
- Landing page sections
- API integrations
- Auth flows
- Admin dashboards
- Email templates
- Performance fixes
- Database schemas
- Webhook setups
- UI components
- SEO fixes
- Form logic
- Cron jobs
- Complex animations
- Third-party integrations
- Stripe integrations
- Supabase setups

## What is NOT included
- Native mobile app development (iOS/Android). We strictly build web applications and Progressive Web Apps (PWAs).
- Complex custom 3D modeling or WebGL.
- Extensive branding or logo design.

## Communication
- 100% Asynchronous.
- Zero calls. Zero meetings.
- All requests are managed via Trello.
- Updates and deliveries are communicated via email and Loom screen recordings.

## Tech stack supported
- Core: React, Next.js, TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
- Backend & DB: Supabase, Node.js, REST APIs
- Infrastructure: Vercel

## About OptimaAI
OptimaAI is a web development and AI automation company based in Budapest, Hungary. Cue is a productized service offering created by the OptimaAI team to serve international clients with an asynchronous, high-speed development model.

## Contact
Email: hello@optimaai.eu
Website: https://cue.optimaai.eu
Parent Company: https://optimaai.eu
